title: taraxacum lunglungense
intro: Taraxacum lunglungense, commonly known as the Tibetan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is native to the Tibetan Plateau and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum lunglungense include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Traditional herbal preparations of Taraxacum lunglungense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
